tiers.core_complete: Major polity has broad settlement, district, site, npc, and tension coverage suitable for sustained play.
tiers.playable_complete: Major polity has enough integrated nodes and interfaces for reliable table use.
tiers.navigable_but_thin: Major polity is usable but still under-saturated relative to best-built regions.
tiers.skeleton_present: Major polity exists with baseline hooks but needs structured expansion.
